title: casasia nigrescens
intro: Casasia nigrescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Brazilian tea tree or black casia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Casasia nigrescens include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the leaves to make a tincture or extract.
